title: Judge halts Paramount's $111B purchase of Warner Bros. in win for US states
excerpt: Judge grants restraining order, saying merger "likely to violate antitrust laws."
content_html:
A federal judge today ordered Paramount Skydance and Warner Bros. Discovery to halt their $111 billion merger, handing an early win to states that sued to block the deal. The ruling granted a temporary restraining order prohibiting the firms from completing the merger and from consolidating their operations.

The temporary order is only in effect for 14 days, but it can be converted into a preliminary injunction that would prevent the merger from being completed until the case is resolved. The temporary restraining order can be extended past the 14-day period if more time is needed to rule on a preliminary injunction.

A group of 12 states led by California sued the companies last week in an attempt to block the deal, which had been approved by the Trump administration. The states say the merger will eliminate competition by combining two of the five major Hollywood movie studios, and two of the five major owners of basic cable TV channels.

“My office and attorneys general nationwide have secured an emergency order blocking the unlawful merger of Warner Bros. and Paramount,” California Attorney General Rob Bonta said today. “This is a critical first win in our case to ensure this megamerger never sees the light of day.”

The case is in US District Court for the Northern District of California. US District Judge Araceli Martínez-Olguín wrote in today’s order that the states “make a strong showing that the Transaction will substantially lessen competition” in the theatrical-film market, and that “the Court is persuaded that it can presume the proposed merger is likely to violate antitrust laws.”

Judge cites presumption of illegality

The merged company is expected to have a 27 percent share of the wide-release theatrical distribution market, the judge wrote. Courts have presumed that a merger resulting in a share of 30 percent or more is likely to violate antitrust law, but 30 percent is not the lowest market share that can pose a threat, she wrote.

sentences.zh: Discovery 将停止其价值 1,110 亿美元的合并，让起诉阻止交易的各州提前获胜。

sentences.en: The ruling granted a temporary restraining order prohibiting the firms from completing the merger and from consolidating their operations.
sentences.zh: 该裁决授予临时限制令，禁止这些公司完成合并并巩固其业务。

The temporary restraining order can be extended past the 14-day period if more time is needed to rule on a preliminary injunction.

sentences.zh: 临时命令的有效期只有 14 天，但可以转换为初步禁令，在案件解决之前阻止合并完成。

sentences.en: The temporary restraining order can be extended past the 14-day period if more time is needed to rule on a preliminary injunction.
sentences.zh: 如果需要更多时间来裁定初步禁令，临时限制令可以延长超过 14 天。

The states say the merger will eliminate competition by combining two of the five major Hollywood movie studios, and two of the five major owners of basic cable TV channels.

sentences.en: The states say the merger will eliminate competition by combining two of the five major Hollywood movie studios, and two of the five major owners of basic cable TV channels.

sentences.en: and Paramount,” California Attorney General Rob Bonta said today.

US District Judge Araceli Martínez-Olguín wrote in today’s order that the states “make a strong showing that the Transaction will substantially lessen competition” in the theatrical-film market, and that “the Court is persuaded that it can presume the proposed merger is likely to violate antitrust laws.”

sentences.en: The case is in US District Court for the Northern District of California.
sentences.zh: 此案正在美国加利福尼亚州北区地方法院审理。

sentences.en: US District Judge Araceli Martínez-Olguín wrote in today’s order that the states “make a strong showing that the Transaction will substantially lessen competition” in the theatrical-film market, and that “the Court is persuaded that it can presume the proposed merger is likely to violate antitrust laws.”
sentences.zh: 美国地区法官阿拉塞利·马丁内斯-奥尔金在今天的命令中写道，各州“有力地表明，该交易将大大减少院线电影市场的竞争”，并且“法院相信，它可以推定拟议的合并可能违反反垄断法。”

blocks.html_en: The merged company is expected to have a 27 percent share of the wide-release theatrical distribution market, the judge wrote. Courts have presumed that a merger resulting in a share of 30 percent or more is likely to violate antitrust law, but 30 percent is not the lowest market share that can pose a threat, she wrote.

sentences.en: The merged company is expected to have a 27 percent share of the wide-release theatrical distribution market, the judge wrote.
sentences.zh: 法官写道，合并后的公司预计将占据广泛发行的戏剧发行市场 27% 的份额。

sentences.en: Courts have presumed that a merger resulting in a share of 30 percent or more is likely to violate antitrust law, but 30 percent is not the lowest market share that can pose a threat, she wrote.
sentences.zh: 她写道，法院推定，导致份额达到 30% 或以上的合并可能违反反垄断法，但 30% 并不是可能构成威胁的最低市场份额。

content_html_zh:
一名联邦法官今天下令派拉蒙 Skydance 和华纳兄弟。 Discovery 将停止其价值 1,110 亿美元的合并，让起诉阻止交易的各州提前获胜。 该裁决授予临时限制令，禁止这些公司完成合并并巩固其业务。

临时命令的有效期只有 14 天，但可以转换为初步禁令，在案件解决之前阻止合并完成。 如果需要更多时间来裁定初步禁令，临时限制令可以延长超过 14 天。

以加利福尼亚州为首的 12 个州上周起诉了这些公司，试图阻止这项已得到特朗普政府批准的交易。 各州表示，此次合并将通过合并好莱坞五个主要电影制片厂中的两家以及基本有线电视频道五个主要所有者中的两家来消除竞争。

“我的办公室和全国总检察长已获得一项紧急命令，阻止华纳兄弟的非法合并。 加州总检察长罗布·邦塔 (Rob Bonta) 今天表示。 “对于我们来说，这是至关重要的首场胜利，以确保这一大型合并永远不会成功。”

此案正在美国加利福尼亚州北区地方法院审理。 美国地区法官阿拉塞利·马丁内斯-奥尔金在今天的命令中写道，各州“有力地表明，该交易将大大减少院线电影市场的竞争”，并且“法院相信，它可以推定拟议的合并可能违反反垄断法。”

法官援引非法推定

法官写道，合并后的公司预计将占据广泛发行的戏剧发行市场 27% 的份额。 她写道，法院推定，导致份额达到 30% 或以上的合并可能违反反垄断法，但 30% 并不是可能构成威胁的最低市场份额。
